goal: Find concrete code, math, or logic bugs in the PowerScout/scouting web app, Mac app, and SyntheticFullSystemTest after the latest checkpoint.

delegation.reason: End-of-cue bounded QA swarm requested by Leo: three independent read-only verifiers for web logic, math/model logic, and PowerScout parity.
delegation.token_budget_posture: Use gpt-5.4-mini medium for all three agents; no GPT-5.5 high/xhigh and no GPT-5.4 xhigh.

agent_reports.scope: Inspect shift strategy/model code for one concrete math, calibration, or logic bug after the latest redesign checkpoint.
agent_reports.result: Found that ShiftStrategyOptions.defenseDuringOwnShiftCredit is defined and defaulted to 0.1, but is not read by the shift strategy computation, so the intended own-shift defense credit knob is a no-op.
agent_reports.scope_compliance: Stayed read-only and within model/math verification scope.
agent_reports.verification: Static evidence: the option appears in the type/defaults but no computation reads it; changing the option cannot affect outputs before integration fix.
agent_reports.notes: Main-thread integration should make the option affect strategy outputs and add a regression proving different values change the selected plan or point-difference math.

agent_reports.scope: Inspect PowerScout native app parity for one concrete code, math, or logic bug after the latest web/Mac dashboard changes.
commands_run: rg over PowerScout and relay planner files
nl/sed reads of RelayView.swift, PowerScoutModels.swift, scoutRelayPager.ts, scoutRelayPager.test.mjs
agent_reports.result: Found that PowerScout RelayView always sorts and labels relay providers by mainlandOrder, despite the data model having globalVpnOrder and the web relay planner supporting region-specific ordering.
agent_reports.scope_compliance: Stayed read-only and within Mac parity verification scope.
agent_reports.verification: Static evidence: RelayView sorts with mainlandOrder and renders Mainland order tags only; globalVpnOrder is tested in model data and web planner but not exposed in the native relay UI.
agent_reports.notes: Main-thread integration should add a region selector or equivalent native ordering helper so Sanya/mainland and global/VPN relay order both render correctly.

agent_reports.scope: Audit new scouting-only Render+Upstash relay service and Desktop setup guide.
agent_reports.result: No setup blockers found. Noted operational risks: Render branch must contain scouting-relay and allowed origins must include real browser origins.
agent_reports.scope_compliance: Stayed read-only; inspected relay service, tests, and setup guide.
agent_reports.verification: Relay service and checklist are coherent with Node, root directory scouting-relay, npm install && npm run check, npm start, Upstash/admin/scout/allowed-origin env vars.

agent_reports.scope: Move completed task queue items to completed queue and leave blocked/deferred active.
agent_reports.result: Active queue now contains only two blocked items and one deferred marketing item.
agent_reports.scope_compliance: Edited only codex_task_queue.md and codex_task_queue_completed.md as assigned.
agent_reports.verification: Main conductor inspected queue: active queue contains only blocked/deferred items.

agent_reports.scope: Verify PowerScout Dashboard cleanup and targeted screenshot method.
agent_reports.result: Confirmed old bottom Dashboard chunk was removed; found dead DashboardView store/openURL dependencies, which main conductor removed. Confirmed capture_window.sh is the correct single-window screenshot path.
agent_reports.scope_compliance: Stayed read-only and did not take screenshots.
agent_reports.verification: Main conductor removed dead dependencies and reran swift test successfully.

agent_reports.scope: Broad completion audit of overnight goal.
agent_reports.result: Remote compact task ran out of context. Main conductor split the audit into smaller mini-audits.

agent_reports.verification: No completion evidence produced by this agent.
blockers: Broad one-shot audit exceeded remote compact context.

agent_reports.scope: Audit shift metric, reconciliation, and strategy source/tests.
agent_reports.result: Math/model requirements are proven complete by source and tests; only non-blocking edge-case expansion noted for extra sanitization branches.
agent_reports.scope_compliance: Stayed read-only; inspected only assigned math/model files.
agent_reports.verification: Confirmed Contribution/Floor/Ceiling/Floor Non Zero/Defense/deviations, reconciliation, defender-share normalization, std-dev variance combination, defense saturation, and RP/variance/alliance-selection objectives.

agent_reports.scope: Audit SFT evidence, morning report, and subagent reporting state.
agent_reports.result: Synthetic event checks and morning report are sufficiently evidenced. The audit flagged missing completion/report recording for itself, now corrected by conductor.
agent_reports.scope_compliance: Stayed read-only; inspected only assigned SFT/docs/queue/report surfaces.
agent_reports.verification: Confirmed no-future leakage, scout coverage, score consistency, required artifacts, and report proof are documented/implemented.

agent_reports.scope: Audit UI surfacing for Match Scout V4 shifts, Admin V4 strategy, strategy preview, and PowerScout dashboard.
agent_reports.result: Core UI surfaces are present. Missing/weak evidence: StrategyPreviewView uses hardcoded teams/guessed match, and PowerScout Dashboard passes a hardcoded nextMatchDashboard snapshot.
agent_reports.scope_compliance: Stayed read-only; inspected only assigned UI/source/test files.
agent_reports.verification: Confirmed required surfaces exist; identified live-data gaps that prevent claiming full dynamic surfacing.

agent_reports.scope: Read-only inspection of /strategy-preview data flow and Admin V4 handoff candidates.
agent_reports.result: Confirmed /strategy-preview no longer depends on inline demo-only arrays after conductor integration; recommended source-aware labels and tests, which were added.
agent_reports.scope_compliance: Stayed within web strategy preview/Admin V4 source inspection.
agent_reports.verification: Conductor later ran node --test tests/strategyPreviewSnapshot.test.mjs tests/adminV4UxStructure.test.mjs, npm test, npm run typecheck, npm run build, and browser route check.
agent_reports.notes: Earlier compacted thread named this agent Chandrasekhar/Ada; report records the user-facing nickname Ada.

agent_reports.scope: Read-only inspection of native PowerScout next-match dashboard data flow and local-storage patterns.
agent_reports.result: Confirmed the Mac dashboard was still hardcoded before conductor integration; recommended an Application Support/repo JSON store with explicit fallback source messaging, which was added.
agent_reports.verification: Conductor later ran ./script/build_and_run.sh twice, passing 14 Swift tests, and captured the PowerScout app window only.
agent_reports.notes: Earlier compacted thread named this agent Feynman/Noether; report records the user-facing nickname Noether.

agent_reports.scope: Read-only QA of web strategy snapshot source, Admin V4 publisher, and tests.
agent_reports.result: Found medium stale-event bug: /strategy-preview could load a stored Admin V4 snapshot from another event. Conductor fixed with expected-event validation, Admin V4 clearing when no plan exists, and a stale-snapshot regression test.
agent_reports.scope_compliance: Stayed within assigned web files and focused tests.
agent_reports.verification: After fix: node --test tests/strategyPreviewSnapshot.test.mjs tests/adminV4UxStructure.test.mjs passed 16/16.

agent_reports.scope: Read-only QA of PowerScout local next-match dashboard JSON loading, fallback, source display, and tests.
agent_reports.result: Found high corrupt-first-candidate bug: malformed Application Support JSON prevented loading a valid repo JSON snapshot. Conductor fixed by continuing past unreadable candidates and added a regression test.
agent_reports.scope_compliance: Stayed within assigned native files and tests.

agent_reports.scope: Read-only logic QA of web/native next-match score, margin, win probability, source status, and stale-data risks.
agent_reports.result: Found high stale-native-snapshot risk: fixed-order loading could prefer older Application Support JSON over newer repo output. Conductor fixed by choosing the freshest valid snapshot by savedAt and added a regression test.
agent_reports.scope_compliance: Stayed within assigned strategy/dashboard files and related tests.
